metadata.description: Per-treebank validation combining six analyses: Grambank cross-validation, entropy threshold sensitivity, representativeness, autocorrelation, annotation confound, and family bias diagnostics.

diagnostic_flags: WARNING: 14 languages with feat_completeness < 0.3 may have artifactual morph_richness
CRITICAL: feat_completeness is a strong confound for morph_richness (rho > 0.7)
WARNING: >20% of bin-treebank combos show serial dependence
